ai_summary.one_liner: RL-based iterative improvement method (Recap) for VLA policies using advantage-weighted regression with a learned value function
ai_summary.problem: VLA policies plateau with imitation learning alone; no scalable RL method for real-robot VLA fine-tuning
ai_summary.solution: Recap: train separate value function from VLM, compute binarized advantages, condition VLA on success indicator
ai_summary.key_result: 2-3x throughput improvement on complex real-world tasks (laundry, box assembly, espresso) over IL-only baseline

cover_caption: Interaction between the π₀.₆* VLA and value function during Recap training. The π₀.₆* VLA uses a pre-trained VLM backbone. Training follows the KI recipe, with next-token prediction on many data sources in pre-training, and a flow-matching action-expert with stop gradient. The VLA is conditioned on a binarized advantage indicator, obtained from a separate value function initialized from a pre-trained but smaller VLM model.
source_title: π₀.₆: a VLA That Learns From Experience

figures.caption: Some of the tasks learned by Recap. π₀.₆* trained with Recap can make espresso drinks, assemble cardboard boxes, and fold diverse and realistic laundry with a high success rate. Each task involves realistic variability – flattened unfolded boxes stick together and bend, making espresso drinks requires pouring liquids, and folding laundry requires generalization to a wide range of clothing items.
figures.caption_ko: RECAP으로 학습된 태스크들. π₀.₆*는 에스프레소 음료 만들기, 박스 조립, 다양한 세탁물 접기를 높은 성공률로 수행한다. 각 태스크에는 현실적인 변동성이 있다 — 납작한 박스가 서로 달라붙거나 구부러지고, 에스프레소는 액체 따르기가 필요하며, 세탁물은 다양한 의류 아이템에 대한 일반화가 필요하다.

figures.caption: Interaction between the π₀.₆* VLA and value function during Recap training. The π₀.₆* VLA uses a pre-trained VLM backbone. Training follows the KI recipe, with next-token prediction on many data sources in pre-training, and a flow-matching action-expert with stop gradient. The VLA is conditioned on a binarized advantage indicator, obtained from a separate value function initialized from a pre-trained but smaller VLM model.
figures.caption_ko: RECAP 학습 중 π₀.₆* VLA와 가치함수의 상호작용. π₀.₆* VLA는 사전학습된 VLM 백본을 사용한다. 학습은 KI 레시피를 따르며, 사전학습에서 다양한 데이터 소스로 다음 토큰 예측을 수행하고, flow-matching action expert에 stop gradient를 적용한다. VLA는 별도의 더 작은 VLM으로 초기화된 가치함수에서 얻은 이진 advantage indicator로 컨디셔닝된다.

figures.caption: The robot setup used in our experiments. π₀.₆* is trained on data from many different robots in pre-training. For the iterative improvement experiments, we use a static bimanual system with two 6 DoF arms with parallel jaw grippers.
figures.caption_ko: 실험에 사용된 로봇 설정. π₀.₆*는 사전학습에서 다양한 로봇 데이터로 학습된다. 반복 개선 실험에서는 병렬 그리퍼가 달린 6 DoF 팔 2개를 가진 정적 양팔 시스템을 사용한다.

figures.caption: Illustrations of the tasks used in our experiments. Tasks include three different laundry variants, assembling boxes, and making coffee drinks with an espresso machine.
figures.caption_ko: 실험에 사용된 태스크 시각화. 태스크는 세 가지 세탁물 변형, 박스 조립, 에스프레소 기계로 커피 음료 만들기를 포함한다.

figures.caption: Throughput (diverse laundry – hardest item). We show the number of successfully completed tasks per hour. Error bars show standard error. Recap applied to π₀.₆* (Ours) leads to substantial improvements in throughput across all stages.
figures.caption_ko: 처리량 (다양한 세탁물 – 가장 어려운 아이템). 시간당 성공 완료 태스크 수를 표시한다. RECAP을 적용한 π₀.₆*(Ours)가 모든 단계에서 처리량을 크게 향상시킨다.
